content.text: Anthropic now lets Claude run as an interactive agent
, Claude can integrate with tools like Gmail, Slack, Notion, Figma, Asana, Google Drive, Box, Canva, Clay and more (50+ apps as of early 2026).
These aren’t just read‑only: Claude can
– e.g. draft or send Slack messages, update docs in Notion, manipulate Figma components, or work with cloud files – depending on the app’s permissions.
On mobile, the Claude app can now pull up
in the chat itself (charts, diagrams, shareable assets), and their state is informed by the full conversation context.
